title: Result - South-korea
content:
Welcome to South Korea, a stunning peninsula where rugged mountains cover 70% of the land and seas surround 3 sides. Explore its natural beauty through hiking, a favorite activity for locals and visitors, or visit its vast coastlines and islands.
Dive into 5,000 years of history and traditional architecture reflecting ancient Korean philosophy. Experience vibrant city life in Seoul and beyond, where skyscrapers, bustling streets, shopping and nightlife thrive. Don’t miss the incredible Korean cuisine, offering diverse regional flavours and recipes influenced by the country’s geography.

## Unique food tradition
Samgyeopsal (pork belly): can be served grilled with a variety of accompaniments like kimchi (fermented vegetables), garlic and sauces.
South Korea has a high demand for English teachers, a strong technology sector and one of the largest gaming markets in the world, offering job opportunities in those fields.

### Local legend or myth
Gumiho (Nine-Tailed Fox): in South Korean folklore, the gumiho is a mythical creature, often depicted as a beautiful woman who can transform into a fox.

### Language of the Land
The South Korean alphabet is called Hangul. Considered one of the world's most perfect writing systems, it's almost completely phonetic.
of the world's seaweed is produced in South Korea.
